title: Ha Giang Bike Tour
html: Stub. Famous motorcycle loop through Vietnam's northern highlands, top of Yahir's Vietnam itinerary draft. Choosing it over a coastal-cities-only route signals the same adventure over comfort travel posture that runs through the China chapter and the six month adventure creed.
